_comment: Big5-encoded translations for CIV.EXE RT_DIALOG strings. Each entry must satisfy len(big5_bytes) <= slot_bytes. Patcher pads shorter Big5 with ASCII spaces to exactly slot_bytes (Win16 null-terminated walker requirement).
_format: english (utf-8) -> big5_string (utf-8, will be encoded to cp950 by patcher)
_slot_policy: MUST equal original slot byte length after encoding+padding
_debug_dlg2000_keep_english: Dialog #2000 is internal test/debug, players will not see it; keep English to avoid wasting QA cycles
This is a test of the 3d stuff: This is a test of the 3d stuff
We will see what it looks like.
